market_summary: Intel (INTC) shows strong recovery, climbing above $46 driven by AI momentum and foundry strategy. Amazon (AMZN) faces year-to-date pressure from heavy capex plans in AWS AI, despite robust core growth and operational cash flow increases.
art_summary: David Garneau's new exhibitions 'Dark Chapters' and 'Reading the Ruins' open today at University of Calgary. Chiayi International Art Doc Film Festival continues with a focus on AI ethics and environmental art.
top_headlines: Intel (INTC) rebounds on AI innovation and foundry expansion
Amazon (AMZN) faces headwinds from $200B capex investment plan
David Garneau exhibitions 'Dark Chapters' and 'Reading the Ruins' debut today
Global markets mixed; oil prices soften amidst conflict concerns

카리나.raw: 안녕하세요, 슬기님! 12:20 기준 업데이트입니다. 오늘 캐나다 캘거리에서 열리는 David Garneau 전시회 소식과 AI 윤리를 다루는 Chiayi 영화제 정보를 주목해보세요.

머스크.raw: 12:20 기준 시장 요약입니다. Intel은 강력한 AI 모멘텀으로 반등세를 보이고 있으며, Amazon은 대규모 AWS 투자가 주가에 단기적 부담을 주고 있으나 펀더멘털은 견고합니다.
